---
title: "SimBioSe-W Shinylive"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
filters:
  - shinylive
shinylive:
  shinylive-repo: "https://posit-dev.github.io/shinylive/r/repo/"   
---

<!---- Intitialisation of the WebR/shinylive filter -------------------------/-->
<!---- Run this once before compiling the app ----------------------------------
library(reticulate)
reticulate::py_config()$python
reticulate::py_run_string("import shinylive; print('Erfolg! shinylive Version:', shinylive.__version__)")
system("quarto add quarto-ext/shinylive --no-prompt")
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->

# Introduction


::: {.card width="20%" .gray}
**Simbiose-W, version 2.0-1 - shinylive**

The app is an open educational resource funded through the SimBiose project by the [Digital Teaching Fund](https://tu-dresden.de/zill/foerdermoeglichkeiten/fondsdll) at TU Dresden. 

You may freely use the app as a whole as well as individual components in accordance with the Creative Commons license [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.de)  (share, edit, attribution, redistribute under the same terms). 
If you remix, modify, or otherwise build directly upon the material, you may distribute your contributions only under the same license as the original. 

No warranty is provided for the accuracy of the content or the technical functionality.


<!--- Link to the production version disabled

**Short link**

![](../www/simbiose-w-qrcode.png){width="6em" height="6em" fig-alt="QR Code auf diese Seite"}

[https://tud.link/q25ufy](https://tud.link/q25ufy)
<br>

/--->

:::{.smallfont}
**Developer source code**<br>
[https://github.com/tpetzoldt/simbiose-w](https://github.com/tpetzoldt/simbiose-w)
:::

::: {.card-footer}
![](../www/by-sa.png){height=36px fig-alt="Logo CC BY-SA"}&nbsp;
![](../www/oer-banner.png){height=32px fig-alt="Logo: Open Educational Resources"}
:::
:::

::: {.card width="60%"}
{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.card width="20%" .gray}
**Usage Tips**

The app is optimized for display on laptop and PC monitors and on popular tablets.

If the text is still too large or too small, you can adjust the font size in your system settings or web browser:

* Windows: [Ctrl] + [-] or [Ctrl] + [+]
* Android/Chrome: Settings -- Accessibility
* iPad: if text overlaps, close all other tabs

Portrait mode is supported on smartphones.

**Development team at TU Dresden**

* [Chair of Limnology](https://tu-dresden.de/hydrobiologie) and 
* [Chair of Didactics of Biology](https://tu-dresden.de/mn/biologie/didaktik).


Thomas Petzoldt, Luisa Henze, Monique Meier


**Technologies**

[R](https://www.r-project.org), [Quarto](https://quarto.org), [Shiny](https://shiny.posit.co/), [deSolve](https://github.com/tpetzoldt/deSolve), [ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/)

::: {.card-footer}
![](../www/TUD_Logo_RGB_horizontal_blau_de.svg){height=44px fig-alt="Logo TU Dresden"}
![](../www/ihb-color.svg){height=40px fig-alt="Logo Institut für Hydrobiologie"}
:::
:::




<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
# Exponential Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _exponential_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _exponential_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _exponential_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _exponential_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _exponential_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _exponential_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
# Limited Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _logistic_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _logistic_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _logistic_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _logistic_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _logistic_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _logist_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->

# Nutrient Limited Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _resource_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _resource_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _resource_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _resource_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _resource_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _resource_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
## Column {width="40%"}

# Predator-Prey Model

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _lv_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _lv_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _lv_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _lv_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _lv_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _lv_code_download.qmd >}}
